---
title: "Contrastive Learning on GRPO Rollouts"
description: "CLIP-style contrastive objective over the G rollouts per prompt — positive/negative pairs from reward signal."
date: "2026-03-06"
categories: [rl]
status: "exploring"
---

## Motivation

Why is this worth pursuing? What gap does it fill?

## Core Idea

Describe the approach. Include equations, pseudocode, or diagrams as needed.

## Open Questions

-

## Potential Experiments

-

## Related Work

-
